sentences.target: Je te souhaite une bonne soirée.

translations.fr: Je te souhaite une bonne soirée.
translations.en: I wish you a nice evening.
translations.de: Ich wünsche dir einen schönen Abend.
translations.pt: Desejo a você uma boa noite.
translations.vi: Chúc bạn một buổi tối vui vẻ.
translations.nl: Ik wens je een fijne avond.
translations.nb: Jeg ønsker deg en fin kveld.
translations.sv: Jag önskar dig en trevlig kväll.
translations.da: Jeg ønsker dig en god aften.
translations.ja: すてきな夜をお過ごしください。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; serves as the subject of the verb.
Clitic personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; indirect object placed before the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb taking a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun 'soirée'.
Qualifying adjective, feminine singular; agrees with and modifies 'soirée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the direct object noun phrase.

sentences.target: On organise une petite soirée chez moi.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɔʁganiz yn pətit swaʁe ʃe mwa/

translations.fr: On organise une petite soirée chez moi.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɔʁganiz yn pətit swaʁe ʃe mwa/
translations.en: We’re organizing a small party at my place.
translations.es: Estamos organizando una pequeña fiesta en mi casa.
translations.de: Wir organisieren eine kleine Feier bei mir zu Hause.
translations.it: Stiamo organizzando una festicciola a casa mia.
translations.ko: 우리 집에서 작은 파티를 준비하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在我家办一个小聚会。
translations.yue: 我哋喺我屋企搞個小聚會。
translations.ru: Мы организуем небольшую вечеринку у меня дома.
translations.pt: Estamos organizando uma festinha na minha casa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tổ chức một bữa tiệc nhỏ tại nhà tôi.
translations.ar: نحن ننظم حفلة صغيرة في بيتي.
translations.nl: We organiseren een klein feestje bij mij thuis.
translations.uk: Ми організовуємо невелику вечірку в мене вдома.
translations.hi: हम मेरे घर पर एक छोटी पार्टी रख रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Organizujemy małą imprezę u mnie w domu.
translations.el: Οργανώνουμε ένα μικρό πάρτι στο σπίτι μου.
translations.nb: Vi arrangerer en liten fest hjemme hos meg.
translations.id: Kami sedang mengadakan pesta kecil di rumah saya.
translations.sv: Vi ordnar en liten fest hemma hos mig.
translations.ro: Organizăm o petrecere mică la mine acasă.
translations.cs: Pořádáme u mě doma malou párty.
translations.da: Vi arrangerer en lille fest hjemme hos mig.
translations.ja: うちで小さなパーティーを企画しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal pronoun used colloquially for 'we'; syntactic subject, triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'soirée'.
Descriptive adjective, feminine singular; agrees with and modifies 'soirée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'organise'.
Preposition indicating location at someone's home/place; heads a prepositional phrase.
Stressed personal pronoun, 1st person singular; object of the preposition 'chez' ('at my place').

sentences.target: La soirée commence à huit heures.

translations.fr: La soirée commence à huit heures.
translations.en: The evening starts at eight o’clock.
translations.es: La fiesta empieza a las ocho.
translations.vi: Bữa tiệc bắt đầu lúc tám giờ.
translations.nl: Het feest begint om acht uur.
translations.hi: पार्टी आठ बजे शुरू होती है।
translations.ja: パーティーは八時に始まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'soirée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the verb 'commence'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive here, taking a temporal PP.
Preposition introducing a time expression.
Cardinal numeral; modifies 'heures' within the prepositional phrase.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the time NP 'huit heures' functioning as complement of 'à'.

sentences.target: Tu viens à ma soirée ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty vjɛ̃ a ma swaʁe sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu viens à ma soirée ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty vjɛ̃ a ma swaʁe sə swaʁ/
translations.en: You’re coming to my party tonight.
translations.es: Vienes a mi fiesta esta noche.
translations.de: Du kommst heute Abend zu meiner Party.
translations.ko: 너 오늘 저녁 내 파티에 올 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今晚会来参加我的聚会。
translations.ru: Ты придёшь на мою вечеринку сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Você vai à minha festa hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn sẽ đến bữa tiệc của tôi.
translations.nl: Vanavond kom je naar mijn feestje.
translations.uk: Ти прийдеш на мою вечірку сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: तुम आज रात मेरी पार्टी में आ रहे हो।
translations.pl: Przyjdziesz dziś wieczorem na moją imprezę.
translations.nb: I kveld kommer du på festen min.
translations.id: Malam ini kamu datang ke pestaku.
translations.sv: I kväll kommer du på min fest.
translations.cs: Dnes večer přijdeš na mou párty.
translations.da: I aften kommer du til min fest.
translations.ja: 今夜は私のパーティーに来る。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; intransitive here, selecting a destination PP.
Preposition introducing the destination noun phrase.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'soirée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object/complement of the preposition 'à'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'soir'; forms the temporal NP 'ce soir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; with 'ce' forms an adverbial time expression ('tonight').
